name: Amoxicillin
description: Antibiyootiga aminopenicillin ee ballaaran. Antibiyootiga ka hortagga afka ee caabuqa nabarka. Qayb ka mid ah xidhmada kiniinka dagaalka ee TCCC ee ka hortagga dhaawaca ee dhaawacyada aan daran ahayn.
indications: Kahortagga caabuqa dhaawaca (nabarrada dhexdhexaadka ah, xirmada kiniinka afka)
dose: 500 mg PO 8dii saacadoodba mar x 7 maalmood (prophylaxis nabarka). 875 mg PO 12 saacadood kasta oo beddel ah.
window: Bilow 3 saacadood gudahooda ka dib dhaawaca ka hortagga dhaawaca.
contraindications: Xasaasiyadda penicillin ee la yaqaan (isticmaal doxycycline beddelkeeda)
warnings: Haddii penicillin uu xasaasiyad ku leeyahay: beddel doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Dariiqa afka kaliya -- isticmaal antibiyootiko IV (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) nabarrada daran ama haddii aan afka loo dulqaadan.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg/kg/maalintii la qaybiyay q8h (ugu badnaan 500 mg/qiyaas). Isticmaal tixraac Broselow ku salaysan miisaanka.

obstetric.note: Badbaadada uurka. Laga door biday doxycycline (taas oo ka mamnuuc ah uurka).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
